description: Autotrader.co.uk is a UK automotive marketplace and retailer platform. Its Connect platform lets partners and retailers integrate vehicle, stock, valuations, search, deals, messaging, and related automotive data/services into their own systems.
summary: Autotrader.co.uk exposes one documented developer integration surface: the Autotrader Connect HTTP API platform, which covers multiple production and beta REST-style APIs and uses short-lived bearer access tokens obtained from Autotrader-issued API credentials.
